description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:Bathroom Wall Cabinet with Double - Door, Bottom Shelf, Wavy - Patterned Doors, Adjustable Inner Shelf, Easy Installation, White & Natural Wood

Main Color:White+Natural

Main Material:Particle Board

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):23.60

Assembled Width (in.):7.90

Assembled Height (in.):27.60

Product Weight (lbs.):22.40

Package Size

Length (in.):31.10

Width (in.):14.40

Height (in.):6.70

Weight (lbs.):26.90

Product Features

  • Sleek Design Meets Functionality：Transform your bathroom into a modern oasis with our wall-mounted cabinet. Featuring a stunning white and natural wood finish, complemented by elegant wave-patterned doors, this cabinet adds a touch of sophistication while maximizing storage space.
  • Smart Storage Solutions：Designed with dual doors and a bottom shelf, this cabinet offers ample space to organize all your bathroom essentials. The adjustable interior shelf allows you to customize the storage to fit your needs, keeping your bathroom clutter-free and organized.
  • Easy Installation, Lasting Quality：Crafted with precision and durability in mind, our cabinet is not only easy to install but also built to withstand the humid bathroom environment. Its high-quality materials ensure long-lasting performance, making it a reliable addition to your home.
  • Perfect for Any Bathroom Style：Whether your bathroom is modern, rustic, or minimalist, this cabinet's versatile design seamlessly blends in. The combination of white and wood tones creates a timeless look that enhances any decor.
  • Upgrade Your Bathroom Experience：Say goodbye to messy countertops and hello to a tidy, stylish bathroom. This wall-mounted cabinet is the perfect solution for keeping your space neat and functional, while adding a chic aesthetic to your daily routine.
